zh.Hulme, Cheshire: 英國英格蘭格亞特 曼徹斯特赫爾姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Peter Piers Dutton III於1465年出生在英國英格蘭爾哈頓時，他的父親Peter Dutton37歲，母親Elizabeth Grosvenor35歲。他於大約1479年與Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hatton在英國英格蘭爾可維結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1503年4月8日在他的家鄉享年38歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾瓦維頓。

zh-hans.Hulme, Cheshire: 英国英格兰格亞特 曼徹斯特赫爾姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Peter Piers Dutton III于1465年出生在英国英格兰爾哈頓时，他的父亲Peter Dutton37岁，母亲Elizabeth Grosvenor35岁。他于大约1479年与Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hatton在英国英格兰爾可維结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1503年4月8日在他的家乡享年38岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾瓦維頓。

nameMeanings.name: Dutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Piers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Regular medieval vernacular form of Peter (from the Old French nominative case, as against the oblique Pier, modern Pierre). In the form Pierce it survived into the 18th century, although in part this may be a transferred use of the surname derived from the medieval given name. Piers was revived in the mid-20th century, perhaps partly under the influence of William Langland's great rambling medieval poem Piers Plowman ( 1367–86 ), in which the character of Piers symbolizes the virtues of hard work, honesty, and fairness.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Peter Piers Dutton III was born in 1465, in Hatton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Peter Dutton, was 37 and his mother, Elizabeth Grosvenor, was 35. He married Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hatton about 1479, in Crewe, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 8 April 1503, in his hometown, at the age of 38, and was buried in Waverton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Peter Piers Dutton III est né en 1465, à Hatton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Peter Dutton, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Grosvenor, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hatton environ 1479, à Crewe, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 8 avril 1503, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Waverton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Hulme, Cheshire: Hulme, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Peter Piers Dutton III 1465 in Hatton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Peter Dutton 37 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Grosvenor 35. Er hat um 1479 in Crewe, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hatton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 8. April 1503 im Alter von 38 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Waverton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Peter Piers Dutton IIIが1465年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアハットオンで生まれた時，父Peter Duttonは37歳，母Elizabeth Grosvenorは35歳であった。約1479年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアクレウでElisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hattonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1503年4月8日に故郷で38歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアワバートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Peter Piers Dutton III(이)가 1465년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 해턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter Dutton(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Grosvenor(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1479년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 크레베에서 Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hatton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1503년 4월 8일 그의 고향에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 와버턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Peter Piers Dutton III nasceu em 1465, em Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Peter Dutton, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Grosvenor, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hatton aproximadamente 1479, em Crewe, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 8 de abril de 1503, em sua cidade natal, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Waverton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Peter Piers Dutton III родился в 1465 г. в местности хаттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Peter Dutton было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Grosvenor, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hatton около 1479 г. в местности крю, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 8 апреля 1503 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности вавиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
